title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core supporting read, write, edit, and bash operations, designed as an extensible platform where users can install or write custom extensions. It works with multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, addressing rate-limiting concerns with frontier models.
